headline: PwC Canada Launches AI Governance Certification Program
summary: PwC Canada has launched a new AI governance certification program designed to build trust in AI implementations. The certification focuses on establishing frameworks and standards for responsible AI deployment across organizations.
so_what: Healthcare organizations face intense regulatory scrutiny around AI governance, making this certification potentially valuable for health systems implementing clinical AI. This positions PwC as a leader in AI compliance consulting.
original_title: PwC Canada launches groundbreaking AI governance certification to build Trust in AI
